signalAlerts.successPrimary: You're in. We'll send the signal when Neon Oblivion goes live.
signalAlerts.successSecondary: While you wait, start with Wipe Your Name.
signalAlerts.handoffSecondary: Use the email fallback below if you still want the drop alert right now.
signalAlerts.privacyLine: One release alert. One next-signal update. No spam.
